/CAL:ACM ELIG REPORT, LD 12-04-20/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:FUTURE JURY TRIAL DATE OF 11-20-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/TE:30 MIN/LDPX: 12-13-19/987,2/BAIL:35,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SAORD/SA1:MAELIZABETHDELACRUZ MANGARON/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 12-12-19/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 12-09-19/DOP/
